  • Uses of ProcessDefinitionDTO in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.process

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.process that return types with arguments of type ProcessDefinitionDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionController.activate(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Deploys the definition's current document version and makes it startable.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionController.deactivate(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Takes a definition out of service: no new instances, running ones continue.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionController.get(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    A single process definition.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ProcessDefinitionDTO>>
    ProcessDefinitionController.getAll(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Lists all registered process definitions, deployed or not.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionController.register(Long documentInfoId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Registers a document's current version as a process definition.

    Method

    ProcessDefinitionDTO.from(ProcessDefinition definition)

  • Uses of ProcessDefinitionDTO in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.process

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.process that return ProcessDefinitionDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.activate(Long id, PUser user)
    Deploys the definition's current document version to the engine and makes it startable.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.deactivate(Long id, PUser user)
    Takes an active definition out of service: no new instances can be started from it, while instances that are already running continue untouched.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.get(Long id, PUser user)
    A single definition.
    ProcessDefinitionDTO
    ProcessDefinitionService.register(Long documentInfoId, PUser user)
    Registers the document's current version as a process definition, in state ProcessDefinitionState.DRAFT.
    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.process that return types with arguments of type ProcessDefinitionDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ProcessDefinitionDTO>
    ProcessDefinitionService.getAll(PUser user)
    All registered definitions, deployed or not.
